label: Law & Public Service
title: Careers built on trust, procedure, and public visibility.
description: These roles suit players who want influence through judgement, communication, evidence, and professional standards.

label: Transport & Delivery
title: Keep London moving from route to route.
description: Road-based work creates constant citywide contact, reliable routines, and some of the most naturally social civilian RP.

label: Industry & Skilled Trades
title: Build, repair, recover, and power the city.
description: Hands-on jobs for characters who prefer tools, callouts, heavy work, and practical responsibility over desk-based scenes.

label: Land & Sea Industries
title: Rural and coastal work with tougher conditions.
description: These careers lean into endurance, weather, machinery, and the kind of early-start routine that makes a character feel lived in.

label: Service & Hospitality
title: Frontline jobs that keep local life ticking.
description: Customer-facing work is one of the fastest ways to build contacts, repeat faces, and everyday reputation across the city.
